heading: Tax imposed
label: 2101 Tax imposed

children.heading: Imposition
children.label: a Imposition
children.text: Except as provided in section 2107, a tax is hereby imposed on the transfer of the taxable estate (determined as provided in section 2106) of every decedent nonresident not a citizen of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount of the taxable estate, and

children.label: B
children.text: the amount of the adjusted taxable gifts, over
a tentative tax computed under section 2001(c) on the amount of the adjusted taxable gifts.

children.heading: Adjusted taxable gifts defined
children.label: 1 Adjusted taxable gifts defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “adjusted taxable gifts” means the total amount of the taxable gifts (within the meaning of section 2503 as modified by section 2511) made by the decedent after , other than gifts which are includible in the gross estate of the decedent.December 31, 1976

children.heading: Adjustment for certain gift tax
children.label: 2 Adjustment for certain gift tax
children.text: For purposes of this section, the rules of section 2001(d) shall apply.
